aiterm.name: aiterm
aiterm.description: AI Terminal - Terminal interface and execution system for AI agents
aiterm.notes: Repository for AI terminal interface and execution capabilities. May be relevant for mindterm integration and terminal operation improvements.

xtermjs.name: xterm.js
xtermjs.description: A terminal emulator for the web - Build terminals in the browser
xtermjs.notes: xterm.js is the frontend terminal emulator used by mindterm. It provides the browser-based terminal interface that connects to mindterm's PTY backend via WebSocket. The integration includes FitAddon for automatic terminal resizing. Used by major applications like VS Code, JupyterLab, and many others.

faicey.name: Faicey
faicey.description: UIUX AIML modular response system - Creates personalized interface expressions (faces) for AI agents
faicey.notes: Faicey is a UI/UX AIML modular response system that creates personalized interface expressions for agents. It combines prompt, agent, dataset, model, and persona to create modular, customizable UI/UX systems. Key principles: user-friendliness, customization, real-time feedback, seamless AI integration, modular/scalable design, multi-modal/multi-model support.

mlodular.name: mlodular
mlodular.notes: mlodular provides modular machine learning components that can be integrated into Faicey expressions for enhanced AI capabilities.

knowledge_entries.title: aiterm GitHub Repository
knowledge_entries.content: The aiterm repository (https://github.com/aiterm) provides terminal interface and execution capabilities for AI agents. This repository may contain relevant patterns, implementations, or utilities that could enhance mindterm's terminal execution capabilities.

knowledge_entries.title: xterm.js Frontend Integration
knowledge_entries.content: mindterm uses xterm.js (https://xtermjs.org/) as its frontend terminal emulator. The integration is implemented in mindx_frontend_ui/src/components/MindTerm.tsx using React. Key features: Terminal emulation with proper ANSI support, FitAddon for automatic resizing, WebSocket connection to mindterm backend, Real-time output streaming, Keystroke forwarding, Policy-gated command execution. The xterm.js library (v5.3.0) is installed via npm and provides the browser-based terminal interface that connects to mindterm's PTY backend.

knowledge_entries.title: Faicey UI/UX Expression System
knowledge_entries.content: Faicey creates personalized interface expressions (faces) for agents by combining: Prompt (agent instructions), Agent (identity and capabilities), Dataset (knowledge base), Model (LLM configuration), Persona (cognitive identity). The resulting expression is a modular, customizable UI/UX system that adapts to the agent's identity. Faicey principles include: user-friendliness, customization options (drag-and-drop, toggles), real-time feedback, seamless AI integration, modular/scalable/fast design, multi-modal/multi-model support.
